doneWhen: `pnpm build` passes with no dead imports
`gwrk server start` / `gwrk server stop` work unchanged
All deleted files have zero live importers

phases.title: Ship Orchestrator → Server Event Bridge

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/ship-orchestrator.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Emit typed events for every stage transition: `ship:start`, `ship:stage`, `ship:complete`, `ship:failed`, `ship:blocked`

tasks.title: Implement src/server/ship-bridge.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Listens for orchestrator events, converts to `MessageBuilder` calls, dispatches via `notifySlack(

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/ship.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Remove direct `notifySlack` calls — the bridge handles it. Wire orchestrator events to bridge when server is running.

tasks.title: Implement src/server/index.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Initialize ship-bridge listener on server start

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `gwrk ship 018 5` with server running sends exactly one Slack message (ship:complete → reviewReady)
Ship without server running works identically to today (CLI output only)
No `notifySlack` calls remain in `ship.ts` — all moved to bridge

tasks.title: Implement src/server/slack-home.ts

doneWhen: Tap ✅ Merge in Slack → PR merged, plan DAG updated, confirmation posted
Tap 🔄 Retry → ship re-dispatched, confirmation posted
`/gwrk status` → plan DAG summary (same output as `gwrk plan status`)
Home tab shows: features by status, pending blessings, active ships

Tap Approve → spec marked reviewed in plan DAG
`gwrk define plan 006` → Slack: "📐 Plan Ready" with `[✅ Approve]`

doneWhen: Close laptop lid, open it → `gwrk status` shows `ready` within 30s
